title: stelis quadrata
intro: Stelis quadrata is a species of orchid native to tropical regions of Central and South America. This plant is known for its medicinal properties, particularly in traditional folk medicine, where it is used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of Stelis quadrata include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and act as an antiseptic, making it useful for treating skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Stelis quadrata typically involve infusions or decoctions, where the plant's roots or leaves are steeped in hot water to create a tea that can be consumed or applied topically.
